steps.title: Square both sides
steps.content: Square $\sqrt{k-x}=32-x$ to clear the radical: $$k-x=(32-x)^2=1024-64x+x^2.$$ Note that any solution must also satisfy $32-x\ge 0$ so the right side is non-negative.

steps.title: Apply the unique-solution condition
steps.content: The smallest $k$ giving a valid solution is the tangency case $\Delta=0$: $$4k-127=0 \Rightarrow 4k=127.$$ The repeated root $x=\tfrac{63}{2}=31.5$ satisfies $x\le 32$, so it is valid. The answer is 127.
